## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **.NET SDK:** (run `dotnet --version`)
- **PostgreSQL:** (run `SELECT version();`)
- **Branch:** (run `git branch --show-current`)
- **Commit:** (run `git log -1 --oneline`)

## Logs / Screenshots

<!-- Paste psql output, error messages, or attach screenshots. -->

## Severity

- [ ] Blocker — application unusable
- [ ] Critical — major feature broken
- [ ] Major — feature partially broken
- [ ] Minor — small impact
- [ ] Cosmetic — visual/typo
